data.body:
[Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment Preview]

A Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment will begin on 6/6 (Tue)!
Pick-Up Student: 3★ Midori & 2★ Momoi

Pick-Up Recruitment Schedule: 6/6 (Tue) 2:00 – 6/13 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
